title: 10 best herbal teas for reddened corners in mouth
description: Ulmus rubra, also known as slippery elm, teas helps with reddened corners in mouth because of its anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm irritated tissues. The mucilaginous compounds present in slippery elm help to form a protective barrier on the affected area, reducing inflammation and discomfort. This natural remedy has been traditionally used to treat various oral health issues, including mouth ulcers, gum inflammation, and sore mouth corners, providing quick relief and ...
